title: tetraneuris ivesiana
intro: Tetraneuris ivesiana, also known as Ives' sunflower or Rocky Mountain sunflower, is a perennial herb that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Tetraneuris ivesiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
